description:
The BillboardParticleRenderer component is a rendering style component for Particle systems that give them the default square tile based particles.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Material: The material to use to render the particles.
fields.MinBillboardScreenSize: The minimum size a particle can be on the screen.
fields.MaxBillboardScreenSize: The maximum size a particle can be on the screen.
fields.MotionVectorMode: How to handle rendering particles when it comes to their motion vectors.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the renderer slot in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
